toast.enrich_started: Enrichment started. Data will update shortly.

bulk.confirm_delete: Really delete {{count}} books? This cannot be undone.
bulk.select_mode_hint: Bulk select mode is active — click books to select them
bulk.insert_position_max: Current max index is validated by the server. Leave empty to append to the end.
bulk.select_mode_tooltip: Select multiple books for bulk actions

books.title: My Library
books.empty_library: Start by adding your first book — manually or by scanning a whole shelf with AI.
books.delete_confirm_body: This action cannot be undone. Do you really want to remove this book?
books.reorder_hint: Drag books to reorder. On touch devices, long-press to start drag.
books.reorder_mode_tooltip: Rearrange books on shelf, then save the new order
books.sample_banner: This is a sample library — explore the app, then clear the sample data when you're ready.

book_detail.title: Book details
book_detail.delete_confirm_body: This action cannot be undone. Do you really want to remove this book?
book_detail.danger_zone_hint: Permanently deleting this book cannot be undone. Continue only if you are sure.

locations.title: Location management
locations.description: Manage rooms, furniture, and shelves for quick book organization.
locations.empty_body: Create your first location above so you always know where your books are.
locations.delete_body: Do you really want to delete {{room}} / {{furniture}} / {{shelf}}? This will not delete books in this location, but their location information will be lost.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dark_mode_description: Theme preference is stored locally in your browser.
settings.language_description: Language selection is stored locally in your browser.
settings.export_description: Download a CSV with all books for backup or further processing.
settings.export_error: Library export failed. Please try again.
settings.enrich_description: Automatically fill in ISBN, publisher, year, language, and description for all books using online databases.
settings.danger_description: Deletes all books, loans and locations. This cannot be undone.
settings.export_data_description: Download a full JSON export of all your personal data (GDPR Art. 20 — right to portability).
settings.delete_account_description: Permanently delete your account, all libraries, books, loans and billing data. This cannot be undone.
settings.delete_account_error: Account deletion failed. Please check your password and try again.
settings.legal_description: Privacy policy and terms of use.

app.update_available: A new version of Shelfy is available — click to update.

landing.hero_title: Your entire book collection, catalogued in minutes.
landing.hero_subtitle: For home readers, book clubs, schools, and small libraries. Photograph your shelves and Shelfy's AI reads every spine — building a searchable catalog by title, author, and ISBN.
landing.hero_free_limits: Free to start · No credit card required · Up to 200 books
landing.how_subtitle: Three steps. One photo. A complete catalog.
landing.how_step_1_desc: Take a shelf photo with your phone. Done.
landing.how_step_2_desc: Shelfy reads titles and authors. You can quickly correct anything on the review screen.
landing.how_step_3_desc: Find any book by title, author, or ISBN. Share your catalog with family.
landing.pricing_teaser_title: Free to start. Simple to grow.
landing.pricing_teaser_desc: Shelfy is free for small libraries. When your collection outgrows the free tier, Pro unlocks unlimited scans and shelves — no surprises, cancel anytime.
landing.pricing_teaser_trust: Your data stays yours. Export everything, delete your account anytime — no hoops.
landing.faq_1_q: How does shelf scanning actually work?
landing.faq_1_a: You take a photo of your bookshelf and our AI reads the spines to identify each book. It pulls in titles, authors, and other metadata automatically. Most shelves take under a minute.
landing.faq_2_a: Yes. Your library data belongs to you. We don't sell it or share it with third parties. You can export a full copy or delete your account at any time from Settings.
landing.faq_3_q: What if the AI gets a title wrong?
landing.faq_3_a: If AI misses something, you can correct it on the review screen before saving. You can also edit book details anytime later.
landing.faq_4_a: The Free plan covers most home libraries: up to 200 books, 5 shelf scans/month, and 20 metadata enrichments. Upgrade anytime if you need more.
landing.faq_5_q: Can I share my library with family?
landing.faq_5_a: Absolutely. You can invite family members to view or help manage your library. Everyone sees the same catalog, so no more asking "do we already own this one?"
landing.final_cta_title: Ready to know every book you own?
landing.final_cta_subtitle: Home readers, book clubs, schools, and small libraries — finally, a catalog that takes minutes to build and seconds to search.
landing.hero_trust_summary: Your data stays yours. Export anytime and delete your account whenever you want.
landing.audience_title: Pick the plan by who shares the shelves
landing.audience_subtitle: Shelfy is not only for one home collection. The same workflow fits families, clubs, classrooms, and small community libraries.
landing.audience_home_desc: Know what you already own and share the catalog with your partner, kids, or housemates.
landing.audience_club_desc: One shared record for a community shelf, lending, and collaborative book management.
landing.audience_school_desc: Track classroom and teaching books without spreadsheets nobody updates after a month.
landing.audience_library_desc: A catalog for a local library, club room, or office bookshelf where simple operations matter.
landing.trust_subtitle: Shelfy does not rely on invented logos or inflated numbers. It relies on clear controls, transparency, and practical use.
landing.trust_data_copy: Export, account deletion, and privacy controls are built into the product. We do not sell your book catalog to third parties.
landing.trust_builder_copy: The project is being shaped openly around real home, club, and school library workflows.
landing.trust_pilot_copy: Early users and pilot libraries help validate the shelf-scanning workflow — no fake testimonials.

scan.title: Scan shelf
scan.step_location_desc: Choose the room, bookcase, and shelf you want to scan.
scan.step_scan_desc: Take a photo of the entire shelf so all book spines are visible from left to right.
scan.step_scan_multi_desc: Photograph the shelf in sections from left to right. Each photo should capture about 5–10 books with readable spine detail. You can add multiple photos.
scan.step_review_desc: Found {{count}} books. Review and correct the details if needed.
scan.fill_location: Fill in all fields for the new location.
scan.take_photo_desc: AI will recognize books on the shelf from left to right
scan.take_next_photo_desc: Photograph the next section of the shelf (continue to the right)
scan.scanning_desc: AI is reading book spines on the shelf
scan.no_books_found: No books found. Please try again.
scan.total_books_found: Total {{count}} books found across all photos
scan.draft_found_desc: You have an unfinished shelf scan. Do you want to restore it?
scan.mode_replace_desc: Replaces all books on the shelf with the new scan.
scan.mode_append_desc: Adds scanned books to the right of the selected book.
scan.append_hint: Newly scanned books will be inserted to the right of selected book.
scan.tip_lighting: Good lighting — avoid shadows or glare on book spines.
scan.tip_framing: Hold phone horizontally and capture spines in a single row.
scan.tip_count: Fit 5–10 books per photo for the clearest spine detail.
scan.tip_segments: Photograph in sections from left to right — use 'Add another photo' for long shelves.
scan.remove_segment_body: This will discard all books detected in this photo. This cannot be undone.
scan.no_locations_body: Create your first shelf so scanned books have a home right away.

add_book.ai_hint: AI will recognize title and author
add_book.location_help: Missing a room or shelf? Create a new location, then come back here.
add_book.location_optional_hint: You do not have to pick a location now. The book will save without it and you can place it later from the book detail.

onboarding.title: How would you like to start?
onboarding.subtitle: Pick the option that works best for you.
onboarding.action_scan_desc: Take a photo and AI will recognise all books at once.
onboarding.action_manual_desc: Search by title or ISBN and add books one by one.
onboarding.action_locations_desc: Define rooms and shelves so you always know where each book is.
onboarding.settings_reset_desc: Show the first-time setup wizard again.

bookshelf.title: My bookshelves
bookshelf.empty_desc: Organize books by room, bookcase, and shelf.
bookshelf.no_books_hint: All shelves are empty. Scan a shelf or add books, then assign them to a location.

library.title: Library management
library.description: Select the active library and manage its members.
library.add_error_403: You don't have permission to add members.
library.add_error_404: No user with that email address found.
library.remove_body: Remove {{email}} from this library? They will lose access immediately. This cannot be undone.

billing.checkout_success: Subscription activated! Your plan has been upgraded.
billing.quota_message: You've used {{used}} of {{limit}} {{metric}} on the {{plan}} plan.
billing.library_limit_message: You've reached the library limit for the {{plan}} plan.
billing.member_limit_message: You've reached the member limit for the {{plan}} plan.
billing.book_limit_message: You've reached the book limit for the {{plan}} plan.
billing.guest_banner_text: You're browsing as a guest. Sign in to subscribe.
billing.pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include PWA install and CSV export.
billing.pricing_footer: All prices in CZK, billed via Stripe. Cancel anytime. Questions? Contact us.
billing.plan_free_audience: For individuals and small home collections
billing.plan_free_use_case: Try shelf scanning and catalog your books at home without a credit card.
billing.plan_home_audience: For families and shared home libraries
billing.plan_home_use_case: Best when several people manage one growing collection beyond the free limits.
billing.plan_pro_audience: For collectors, clubs, and small teams
billing.plan_pro_use_case: More libraries, larger catalogs, and enough scans for regularly adding new shelves.
billing.plan_library_audience: For schools, associations, and small libraries
billing.plan_library_use_case: For classroom, club, or local libraries managed by multiple members.

csv.import_description: Upload a CSV file with columns: title, author, isbn, publisher, language, publication_year, description, reading_status, room, furniture, shelf, shelf_position. First row must be a header.

auth.intro_title: Create your Shelfy account in under a minute
auth.intro_subtitle: Free plan includes up to 200 books and 5 shelf scans per month. You can upgrade anytime.
auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.password_reset_request_success: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
auth.reset_invalid_or_expired: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.password_reset_success: Password reset successfully. Please sign in.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: A short overview of notable Shelfy changes — especially updates that affect stability, security, or day-to-day use.

borrowers.title: Borrowers
borrowers.subtitle: People who have borrowed books from this library.
borrowers.empty_description: Borrowers are created when you lend a book.
borrowers.anonymized_hint: This borrower's personal data has been deleted. Lending history is kept.
borrowers.edit_history_hint: Changes apply to the borrower record only. Past loan rows keep the borrower text from when they were lent.
borrowers.anonymize_confirm_body: This removes {{name}}'s name, contact, and notes — and clears those fields on every related loan record. The lending history (books, dates, return condition) is kept.
borrowers.merge_picker_hint: Pick a borrower to keep. {{source}}'s loans will move over and {{source}} will be deleted.
borrowers.merge_no_candidates: No other borrowers to merge into.
borrowers.merge_truncated_hint: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}}. Refine your search to see the rest.
borrowers.merge_confirm_body: Move every loan from {{source}} to {{target}}, then delete {{source}}. You will be redirected to {{target}}.
borrowers.bulk_anon_picker_hint: Pick a cutoff date. Borrowers whose most recent loan is older — and who have no active loans — will be anonymized. Records with no loans at all are also eligible.
